title: add_patch
description: Introduce a new patch for a file the port doesn't currently touch. Either supply diff inline, or set from_dupe=true to pick up the latest matching basename from <wrksrc>/.genpatch-out/.

target.description: Relpath under ports/<origin>/ where the new patch lives, e.g. 'dragonfly/patch-src_main.c'

from_dupe.description: If true, translator picks the most recent file matching target's basename from the env's genpatch output dir
